query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as test_deals_after_run FROM deals 
WHERE title LIKE '%Test Lead • %' 
   OR title LIKE '%Idempotent Lead • %' 
   OR title LIKE '%Meta Lead • %' 
   OR title LIKE '%Notification Test Lead • %' 
   OR title LIKE '%No Dup Notif • %'
   OR title LIKE '%Meta Notif Lead • %';
